title: Final round of the mods tournament
description:
For the final round of my mods tournament, both players played a course that I made prior to this. The course had never been seen by anyone, so everyone was watching it blind.

Congrats to AJ and Rynker for passing the damn thing, haha. I thought the last song would get you both!

UPDATE: Download link is here: https://www.mediafire.com/?17yu8y4b67vx87i
